import openpyxl
import pandas as pd
from openpyxl.styles import PatternFill, Font
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

FILE = "/mnt/c/users/usuario/desktop/quiniela/Excel-Mundial-2026.xlsx"

# ── 1. Sheet names ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(FILE, data_only=False\)  # keep formulas
print\("=" * 70\)
print\("SHEET NAMES"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
for i, name in enumerate\(wb.sheetnames, 1\):
    print\(f"  {i}. {name}"\)

# ── 2-4. Per-sheet analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
    print\(f"SHEET: «{sheet_name}»"\)
    print\(f"  Dimensions : {ws.dimensions}"\)
    print\(f"  Max row    : {ws.max_row}"\)
    print\(f"  Max column : {ws.max_column}"\)

    # --- collect raw cell data \(values + formulas\) ---
    rows_data = []
    formula_cells = {}
    formatted_cells = {}

    for r_idx, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row,
                                              min_col=1, max_col=ws.max_column\)\):
        row_vals = []
        for cell in row:
            val = cell.value
            row_vals.append\(val\)
            # detect formulas
            if isinstance\(val, str\) and val.startswith\("="\):
                formula_cells[\(cell.row, cell.column\)] = val
            # detect non-default fill
            if cell.fill and cell.fill.fill_type not in \(None, "none"\):
                fg = cell.fill.fgColor
                color_str = fg.rgb if fg.type == "rgb" else str\(fg.theme\)
                formatted_cells[cell.coordinate] = {"fill": color_str}
        rows_data.append\(row_vals\)

    # Build a DataFrame for convenience
    if rows_data:
        df = pd.DataFrame\(rows_data\)

        # Try to identify header row \(first row with most non-null values\)
        header_row = rows_data[0]
        header_non_null = sum\(1 for v in header_row if v is not None\)

        print\(f"\\n  --- HEADER ROW \(row 1\) ---"\)
        for col_idx, h in enumerate\(header_row\):
            col_letter = get_column_letter\(col_idx + 1\)
            print\(f"    [{col_letter}] {repr\(h\)}"\)

        # data types in each column \(from data_only version\)
    print\(f"\\n  --- FORMULAS detected \({len\(formula_cells\)}\) ---"\)
    if formula_cells:
        for \(r, c\), f in list\(formula_cells.items\(\)\)[:30]:
            print\(f"    {get_column_letter\(c\)}{r} : {f}"\)
        if len\(formula_cells\) > 30:
            print\(f"    ... and {len\(formula_cells\)-30} more"\)
    else:
        print\("    \(none in this sheet\)"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- FILL/COLOR formatting \({len\(formatted_cells\)} cells\) ---"\)
    if formatted_cells:
        sample = list\(formatted_cells.items\(\)\)[:15]
        for coord, info in sample:
            print\(f"    {coord}: fill={info['fill']}"\)
        if len\(formatted_cells\) > 15:
            print\(f"    ... and {len\(formatted_cells\)-15} more"\)
    else:
        print\("    \(none detected\)"\)

    # Merged cells
    if ws.merged_cells.ranges:
        print\(f"\\n  --- MERGED CELLS ---"\)
        for mg in list\(ws.merged_cells.ranges\)[:20]:
            print\(f"    {mg}"\)
        if len\(ws.merged_cells.ranges\) > 20:
            print\(f"    ... and {len\(ws.merged_cells.ranges\)-20} more"\)

import openpyxl

FILE = "/mnt/c/users/usuario/desktop/quiniela/Excel-Mundial-2026.xlsx"
wb_vals = openpyxl.load_workbook\(FILE, data_only=True\)

# ── Home sheet: actual cell values ──
print\("=" * 70\)
print\("HOME sheet – all non-null cells with their values"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
ws = wb_vals["Home"]
for row in ws.iter_rows\(\):
    for cell in row:
        if cell.value is not None:
            print\(f"  [{cell.coordinate}] {repr\(cell.value\)}"\)

# ── Credits sheet: first 40 rows, cols A-R ──
print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("CREDITS sheet – first 40 rows, cols A-R \(non-null only\)"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
ws2 = wb_vals["Credits"]
print\(f"Sheet size: {ws2.max_row} rows x {ws2.max_column} columns"\)
for r_idx, row in enumerate\(ws2.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=40, min_col=1, max_col=18\), 1\):
    vals = [\(cell.column_letter, cell.value\) for cell in row if cell.value is not None]
    if vals:
        print\(f"  Row {r_idx}: {vals}"\)

# ── Fixture sheet: rows 2-12, cols A-W ──
print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("FIXTURE sheet – rows 2-12, cols A-W \(actual values\)"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
ws3 = wb_vals["Fixture"]
for r in ws3.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=12, min_col=1, max_col=23, values_only=True\):
    print\(r\)

    print\(r\)

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.utils import column_index_from_string

FILE = "/mnt/c/users/usuario/desktop/quiniela/Excel-Mundial-2026.xlsx"
wb_vals = openpyxl.load_workbook\(FILE, data_only=True\)
ws = wb_vals["WORLDCUP"]

# Final section - champion/scorer prediction area \(last rows\)
print\("=" * 70\)
print\("WORLDCUP – rows 140-192, cols W-AW \(final phase + champion predictions\)"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
w_col = column_index_from_string\("W"\)
aw_col = column_index_from_string\("AW"\)
for r in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=140, max_row=192, min_col=w_col, max_col=aw_col, values_only=True\):
    non_null = [v for v in r if v is not None]
    if non_null:
        print\(r\)

# Also check what's in the "Pool" section around rows 230-258
print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
print\("POOL sheet – rows 155-170 \(elimination rounds section\)"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
ws2 = wb_vals["Pool"]
for r in ws2.iter_rows\(min_row=155, max_row=175, min_col=1, max_col=10, values_only=True\):
    print\(r\)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import openpyxl

FILE = "/mnt/c/users/usuario/desktop/quiniela/Excel-Mundial-2026.xlsx"
wb_vals = openpyxl.load_workbook\(FILE, data_only=True\)

# Count teams in Equipos
ws = wb_vals["Equipos"]
print\("Teams in Equipos \(rows 2-49, cols A-D\):"\)
for r in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=49, min_col=1, max_col=4, values_only=True\):
    if r[0] is not None:
        print\(f"  {r}"\)

# Count groups
ws2 = wb_vals["Equipos"]
groups = set\(\)
for r in ws2.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=49, min_col=3, max_col=3, values_only=True\):
    if r[0]:
        groups.add\(r[0]\)
print\(f"\\nGroups: {sorted\(groups\)}"\)

# Pool sheet rows 230-258 \(final awards section\)
print\("\\nPOOL – rows 235-258 \(champion/scorer awards prediction\):"\)
ws3 = wb_vals["Pool"]
for r in ws3.iter_rows\(min_row=235, max_row=258, min_col=1, max_col=10, values_only=True\):
    non_null = [v for v in r if v is not None]
    if non_null:
        print\(r\)
PYEOF)
